title: Editor
description: Edit storefront content, visuals, and theme settings in a live preview.

empty.title: Choose a storefront template first
empty.description: Select a storefront template before editing copy, images, logo, and theme settings.

actions.resetDescription: This resets the editor to the draft that was loaded when you opened this page.
actions.pauseDescription: Customers will see that the store is unavailable. Your draft stays saved so you can publish again anytime.

toast.reset: Editor reset to the last loaded draft.
toast.imageImportFailed: Could not import this image. Try again.
toast.imageTooLarge: Images must be 15 MB or smaller.
toast.imageUploadFailed: Could not upload this image. Try again.

shell.title: Storefront editor
shell.hint: Click outlined text in the preview, or refine details in settings.
shell.hintPaused: Shop is paused for customers. Edit freely, then publish when you are ready.

media.uploadOrChoose: Upload a file or choose from your library
